name: District Collector & Magistrate — Jagtial
description: District HQ for grievances, disaster, magisterial orders. Office: Collectorate, Jagtial 505327. Verify current officer on district website.

name: District Emergency / Control Room — Jagtial
description: District-level emergency coordination (floods, law & order support).

name: District Control Room (landline)
description: Alternate district control number (Jagtial).

name: Revenue Divisional Officer (RDO) — Korutla revenue division
description: Revenue Division HQ covering Korutla and related mandals. RDO: Sri L. Jivakar Reddy (as per district revenue pages — confirm if transferred).

name: Mandal Revenue Officer (MRO) — Korutla mandal
description: Patta, ROR, mutations, income/caste certificate applications. Office: Jagtial–Nizamabad Road, Korutla 505326. For MRO direct line, enquire at RDO office or visit in person.

name: Mandal Praja Parishad (MPP) — Korutla mandal
description: Rural local body — MPDO office typically **near MRO**, Korutla 505326. For routing: **RDO Korutla** (8886645202, see Revenue above) or district rural development.

name: Korutla Municipality — Municipal Commissioner
description: Municipal administration. Commissioner (from official staff directory): Sri G. Ravinder — call for civic works, UGD, street issues.

name: Korutla Municipality — office (landline)
description: Main office lines for birth/death, tax, town planning. Address often listed as S.R.S.P. Kallur Road area, Korutla 505326. Numbers from public listings — verify.

name: Korutla Municipality — alternate contact
description: Second published landline for Korutla MC (directory sites).

name: Korutla Municipality — email
description: Also: mc.korutla1@gmail.com on some official pages. Use for written complaints and RTI follow-up.

name: Korutla Police Station / JGL sub-division
description: FIR and local law & order. Emergency: 100 or 112. Circle line often 09440795136 (verify on district site).

name: Superintendent of Police — Jagtial district
description: District police HQ — passport, grievances. Official contact on district police page; email often spjagtial@gmail.com (verify on site).

name: District Court — Jagtial
description: Civil/criminal jurisdiction matters. Number from public listings — confirm.

name: Women helpline / She Teams (state)
description: 1091 — Women helpline. 181 — Domestic abuse / women support (Telangana).

name: Childline
description: 1098 — Child protection helpline (national).

name: Fire & rescue
description: 101 — Fire. Korutla may be served by Jagtial fire unit for major calls — dial 101.

name: Health helpline — 104
description: Telangana 104 — medical advice, grievances on government health services.

name: Ambulance — 108
description: Emergency ambulance (Telangana).

name: Police emergency
description: **100** (all-India police). **112** — ERSS single emergency number.

name: Aadhaar / UIDAI
description: **1947** — UIDAI toll-free for enrolment/update queries.

name: Consumer helpline
description: **1915** — National consumer helpline.

name: DMHO — District Medical & Health Officer, Jagtial
description: Overall public health programmes, hospital oversight. Dr. K. Pramodh Kumar (verify current on district site).

name: Deputy DMHO — Jagtial
description: Dr. N. Srinivas (as per public district health listings — confirm).

name: Government General / Civil Hospital — Jagtial (district hospital)
description: Main district referral hospital (~100 beds). Near Old Bus Stand, Jagtial 505327. MS: Dr. Suman Mohan Rao (verify).

name: Community Health Centre (CHC) — Korutla
description: District CHC for Korutla mandal — OPD/inpatient. Exact landline varies; call **104** or DMHO above, or visit campus (often near town centre).

name: Urban PHCs & sub-centres — Korutla municipal area
description: Immunization, ANC, NCD screening under district health. Nearest ward clinic: ask Municipality or CHC Korutla.

name: P.V. Narasimha Rao Veterinary Clinical Complex — Korutla
description: Government veterinary hospital (animals). CVSc campus.

name: India Post — Korutla HO (505326)
description: Speed Post, savings schemes, PIN 505326.

name: Registration & Stamps Department — citizen support (Telangana)
description: Property registration, marriage registration guidance. Toll-free from state charter.

name: TSSPDCL — electricity complaint (state)
description: 1912 — Central electricity complaint number for Southern Power (Telangana). Section office Korutla: confirm on tssouthernpower.com directory.

name: MeeSeva / e-services — district
description: Aadhaar-linked certificates, payments — nearest MeeSeva centre in Korutla bazaar or Jagtial; also online Telangana portals.

name: TSRTC Bus Stand — Korutla
description: State buses to Hyderabad, Karimnagar, Nizamabad, Warangal, Tirupati, etc.

name: National Highway 63 — through Korutla
description: Highway connectivity to Nizamabad, Jagtial corridor.

name: RTA / Transport office — Jagtial
description: Driving licence, vehicle registration for Korutla residents (district HQ).

name: Korutla Railway Station (KRLA)
description: Peddapalli–Nizamabad section. Enquiry: railway 139.

name: IRCTC — train booking
description: Book from station **KORUTLA** or code **KRLA**.
